content.problemStatement:
In this practice problem, you'll debug a Flask application where static files (CSS and images) are not loading correctly. You'll need to identify and fix issues related to file paths and linking in templates. The goal is to ensure that all static assets are properly loaded and displayed on the web page.

### Expected Output:
There are two errors in the code. 

Ideally - the Flask application should launch `home.html` which should load the webpage as per the screenshot. \
`home.html` is the child template which extends the parent template. \
`base.html` is the parent template which uses Jinja2 templating to get the `base.css` from static folder
